'''Obroa-held''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] located within the [[Obroa-skai system/Legends|Obroa-skai system]] on the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] used it to hide her ship, ''[[Trickster]]'', when she helped a force under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] [[Second Battle of Obroa-skai|ambush]] a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] task force over [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]] in the hopes of killing [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]]. After the engagement concluded, it was discovered Shimrra was, in fact, not among the Yuuzhan Vong task force and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fleet withdrew.

==Appearances==
